keyUAEInvestors: DP World Jebel Ali–China logistics corridor

uaeRelations.strategicImportance: UAE–China trade is the largest bilateral relationship in the Arab world. Belt and Road investment flows. 50% of Chinese oil passes through UAE waters. Digital yuan pilot in UAE.

opportunities.title: EV Battery Supply Chain
opportunities.description: CATL and BYD seeking Gulf distribution hubs. UAE can anchor $2B battery logistics and R&D center at Khalifa Industrial Zone.

opportunities.title: Solar Panel Manufacturing Hub
opportunities.description: Longi Green Energy eyeing UAE for Middle East solar assembly. Masdar City 500MW solar panel factory MOU.

riskFactors.title: US-China Decoupling
riskFactors.description: US technology sanctions (CHIPS Act, Huawei restrictions) may complicate UAE entities investing in Chinese tech. Dual-use technology transfer risks.
riskFactors.mitigation: Separate Chinese tech investments from US-aligned portfolio entities

keyMeetingTopics: Digital yuan payment pilot in UAE banks
EV battery logistics hub at Khalifa Industrial Zone
CHIPS Act compliance for UAE entities with China exposure
Belt and Road infrastructure bond co-issuance
